name: Sweet Ball Sprint
author: Poki
description: Sweet Ball Sprint is a fun racing game where snowballs and sweets collide! Roll your snowball, collect delicious candies, and push it forward to create your path. Speed through the course, beat your rivals, and race to the finish line! Do you have what it takes to roll your way to victory? How to play Sweet Ball Sprint? Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Sweet Ball Sprint? Sweet Ball Sprint is created by Xscape. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Sweet Ball Sprint for free? You can play Sweet Ball Sprint for free on Poki. Can I play Sweet Ball Sprint on mobile devices and desktop? Sweet Ball Sprint can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
